# `mxlweb-core` — `backends/wasm/wat-context`

### interface `WatContext`

**Members**

- `varIndex: Map<string, number>`
- `parIndex: Map<string, number>`
- `timeVar: string` — Name of the time variable in the model (maps to the $t f64 param)
- `localNames: Set<string>` — Reaction/assignment names available as WAT named locals ($name)
